2026-0321
2026-04-09JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the District of QuébecAppointment of Mireille Pélissier-Simard of the City of Québec, in the Province of Quebec, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the District of Québec, with residence in the territory of Ville de Québec or in the immediate vicinity thereof.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the District of Québec
precis: Appointment of Mireille Pélissier-Simard of the City of Québec, in the Province of Quebec, Barrister-at-law, to be a Judge of the Superior Court of Quebec for the District of Québec, with residence in the territory of Ville de Québec or in the immediate vicinity thereof.
